source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/10. EC Declaration of Conformity/Declaration of Conformity_2020.03.31.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Declaration of Conformity for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG under Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports CE MDD conformity documentation for Class IIa Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector products under Annex II excluding section 4.
keyPoints: The manufacturer declares sole responsibility for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG are identified as Class IIa under Rule 16, Annex IX.
The declaration cites conformity with Council Directive 93/42/EEC as amended by 2007/47/EC.
The conformity assessment procedure is Annex II, excluding section 4, under supervision of Notified Body 0068.
JaviTech e.K. is identified as the EC representative.
